revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Em_dash%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Em_dash%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Distinguish|Template:En dash}}
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{Short description|Template to output an m-dash character}}
{{COinS safe}}
{{High-use}}
{{Template shortcuts|emdash|--|mdash}}

This template produces an '''[[:en:em dash|em dash]]''' (—), which is longer than both a [[:en:Hyphen|Hyphen]] (-) and an [[:en:En dash|En dash]] (–).

==Usage==
The primary uses of an em dash are:

* To link clauses, as an alternative to a colon or semicolon (e.g. {{xt|Three alkali metals are the usual substituents—sodium, potassium, and lithium.}})
* To set off a phrase or list, as an alternative to a pair of commas or parentheses (e.g. {{xt|Three alkali metals—sodium, potassium, and lithium—are the usual substituents.}})

For further detail on dash usage, see [[:en:MOS:DASH|MOS:DASH]].

==TemplateData==
{{Format TemplateData|JSON={"params":{}, "description":
"Generates an [[:en:em dash|em dash]] ({{emdash}}) character." }
}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Typing-aid templates]]
[[Category:Character-substitution templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
